CustomField.label: S3 Named Credential Name
CustomField.description: Named Credential (SigV4, service s3) used to PutObject file attachments to the Partner Central ephemeral bucket. Optional; required only when users attach files.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: SigV4 Named Credential targeting https://s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com. Leave blank to disable file attachments.
